productDisplayName: Lotto Men Black Dolce Vita Shoes
description: Style Note Designed for the Sports junkie who never compromises on style and comfort, theDolce Vita shoe from lotto comes with a durable upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you stable on various surfaces. Product Details Black shoe with red trims has a foamy rubber upper with mesh inlays on the forefoot and rearfoot, perforations on the midfoot area and central lace-ups Meshed inner with a padded footbed and branding on the tongur and heel collar Outsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe region to act as the toe guard Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort Durable lotto lite outsole with punto flex grooves and waffle pattern lugs all over Material and Care Rubber Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
